injuries.comment: Walman did not play in Tuesday's (Dec. 2) game versus the Wild.
The Oilers said on Friday (Nov. 28) that Roslovic will be out for a couple of weeks.
The Kraken said that Montour is day-to-day ahead of Thursday's (Dec. 4) game against the Oilers, according to Emerald City Hockey.
The Kraken said that Marchment is OUT for Thursday's (Dec. 4) game versus the Oilers.
